articles.title: Goretzka? Yes, but first the Champions League. Qualification shifts the balance and gives greater status to Milan
articles.summary: Milan are experiencing complicated weeks, and last Sunday's defeat - in Reggio Emilia against Sassuolo - has only further aggravated a general state of mind which has not been the best in the Milanello area for some time.

articles.summary: The latest loss of the Serie A season has sent AC Milan into meltdown and the toxicity last seen during the latter stages of last season has returned.
